name: Low-Fat Squash Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 small yellow squash, sliced 1/3 inch thick
1 medium white squash, sliced 1/3 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Spray casserole dish with cooking spray.
Toss the vegetables in the casserole dish. Combine oregano, cheese soup, half-and-half, flour and salt and pepper in a small bowl; mix thoroughly. Toss the vegetables with the soup mixture; sprinkle breadcrumbs and cheese over top. Bake for 30 minutes or until the vegetables are tender but al dente.
